title: Pige clean-room visual comparison and correction ledger
status: active UI Design review; not production fidelity evidence

reference_boundary.reference: Observable ChatGPT-branded Codex desktop client behavior and user-provided screenshots
allowed: Measured pane geometry, spacing, typography scale, grayscale, radii, icon geometry, motion, focus behavior, and state hierarchy
Independent Pige HTML, CSS, SVG geometry, copy, product behavior, and brand assets
prohibited: Third-party JavaScript, CSS, component source, private bundle code, brand artwork, fonts, or proprietary icons
Claims that route availability, manual inspection, or a prototype screenshot proves production implementation

rules: Compare only equivalent content, locale, state, viewport, and scale factor.
Mask native traffic lights, antialiasing-only glyph edges, and dynamic timestamps before image difference.
A surface is locked only after geometry, color, typography, icon, state, keyboard, reduced-motion, and narrow-window checks pass.
Any remaining P0 or P1 discrepancy keeps the overall visual target open.

keyboard_patterns_verified: Library tabs: ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, End update focus, selection, controls, and panel label
Selection toolbar: ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, End move focus without triggering an action
Intermediate Library drawer: Escape closes the drawer and restores focus to the sidebar toggle
focus_return_verified: Closing Note Agent returns focus to the reader toolbar toggle
Opening Note Agent moves focus to the note composer after the panel transition
remaining: Complete real Tab-order walkthrough across every route and focus-containment review for the narrow Note Agent drawer.
Complete screen-reader announcement, six-locale expansion, and platform text-rendering review.

measured_browser_evidence.note: At taller viewports Settings reaches its 820 px cap; at 720 px it retains a 24 px safe inset without overflow. Wide three-pane review remains bound to the 1536 x 1024 target viewport.

remaining: Capture equivalent reference and prototype states at the same device scale, then bind the masked difference result.
Bind the final pixel overlay after production fonts and platform chrome are fixed.
Lock sidebar row rhythm, icon optical weight, and titlebar seam with an overlay.
Intermediate-width drawer Escape and focus return pass; verify focus containment below 680 px.
Lock Markdown line wrapping, heading baselines, table density, and note-agent composer alignment by overlay.
The Library rail and Note Agent now degrade to independently controlled drawers without clipping the reader.
Lock family tabs, result rows, empty state, and search field by overlay.
Lock hierarchy indentation, evidence density, and detail surface by overlay.
Lock sidebar gray, row height, separators, control alignment, and content measure by overlay.
Verify scroll ownership and non-clipped actions at the minimum supported viewport.

open_p0: Complete real keyboard focus-order and screen-reader announcement evidence
open_p1: Complete keyboard/screen-reader and six-locale text-expansion audit across every route
overall.decision: The prototype is broad and interactive, but the pixel-fidelity objective remains open.

fixed_during_review: Three-pane content clipped below its combined fixed rail width.
Narrow reader collapsed into a zero-width grid column.
Settings exceeded a short viewport by eight pixels.
Reader initialization stole focus and showed an unsolicited blue focus ring.
Narrow reader breadcrumb and secondary toolbar actions crowded the title row.
Long localized selection actions escaped the 400 px viewport.
The 760 px narrow breakpoint misclassified the exact 680 px expanded Home as an overlay; the corrected 679 px boundary preserves 280 + 400 px side-by-side geometry at 680 px.
